name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeErrorBudget groups transient surface-wake result seeds by preset surface and clearance for lab diagnostics.
note: Primary aggregate error budget for transient surface wake evidence.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_result_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeResultSeed supplies per-rotor pressure velocity and arrival-time validation seeds.
note: Rotor-level seed input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeAcceptanceGate consumes complete passing seed sets for lab validation acceptance.
note: Global acceptance gate consuming this diagnostic surface.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeValidationRunMatrix supplies live run status and observed evidence slots.
note: Live-run execution status input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTemporalResolution supplies timing constraints for transient wake samples.
note: Transient timing constraint input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTransit supplies target pressure wake speed and fast-to-slow arrival bands.
note: Physics target input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live transient powered-hover surface-wake validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.
